ddls:
CREATE TABLE "isotopes" (
  "isotope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each isotope */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the isotope (e.g., Os) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the isotope (e.g., Osmium) */,
  "atomic_number" INTEGER /* Atomic number of the isotope */,
  "mass_number" INTEGER /* Mass number of the isotope */,
  "isotope_state" TEXT /* State of the isotope (e.g., stable, radioactive) */,
  "discovery_year" INTEGER /* Year the isotope was discovered */,
  "discovery_location" TEXT /* Location where the isotope was discovered */,
  "isotope_type" TEXT /* Type of isotope (e.g., naturally occurring, synthetic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isotope_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nuclide" (
  "nuclide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nuclide */,
  "isotope_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the isotope this nuclide belongs to */,
  "neutron_number" INTEGER /* Number of neutrons in this nuclide */,
  "notation" TEXT /* String representation of the nuclide (e.g., 'Os-184') */,
  "isotope_state" TEXT /* State of the nuclide (e.g., stable, radioactive) */,
  "isotope_type" TEXT /* Type of nuclide (e.g., naturally occurring, synthetic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nuclide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nuclide_isotope_id FOREIGN KEY ("isotope_id") REFERENCES isotopes ("isotope_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decay_modes" (
  "decay_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decay mode */,
  "decay_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the decay mode (e.g., α, β+, β-, γ) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the decay mode */,
  "decay_probability" REAL /* Probability of the decay mode occurring */,
  "decay_type" TEXT /* Type of decay (e.g., nuclear, electron capture) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decay_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "half_lives" (
  "half_life_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each half-life entry */,
  "nuclide_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nuclide this half-life belongs to */,
  "half_life" REAL /* Half-life value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the half-life value (e.g., s, min, h, d, y) */,
  "uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty in the half-life measurement */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the half-life */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("half_life_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_half_lives_nuclide_id FOREIGN KEY ("nuclide_id") REFERENCES nuclide ("nuclide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decay_energies" (
  "decay_energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decay energy entry */,
  "nuclide_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nuclide this decay energy belongs to */,
  "decay_energy" REAL /* Decay energy value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the decay energy value (e.g., MeV, keV) */,
  "uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty in the decay energy measurement */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the decay energy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decay_energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decay_energies_nuclide_id FOREIGN KEY ("nuclide_id") REFERENCES nuclide ("nuclide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decay_products" (
  "decay_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decay product entry */,
  "nuclide_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nuclide this decay product belongs to */,
  "decay_mode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the decay mode used to produce this product */,
  "product_isotope_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the isotope produced in the decay */,
  "branching_ratio" REAL /* Branching ratio of the decay mode leading to the product */,
  "product_state" TEXT /* State of the decay product (e.g., stable, radioactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decay_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decay_products_product_isotope_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_isotope_id") REFERENCES isotopes ("isotope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decay_products_decay_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("decay_mode_id") REFERENCES decay_modes ("decay_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decay_products_nuclide_id FOREIGN KEY ("nuclide_id") REFERENCES nuclide ("nuclide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "abundances" (
  "abundance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each abundance entry */,
  "isotope_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the isotope this abundance belongs to */,
  "abundance" REAL /* Natural abundance of the isotope as a percentage */,
  "isotope_state" TEXT /* State of the isotope (e.g., stable, radioactive) */,
  "abundance_type" TEXT /* Type of abundance (e.g., natural, artificial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("abundance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abundances_isotope_id FOREIGN KEY ("isotope_id") REFERENCES isotopes ("isotope_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, student) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., query, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who executed the query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date and time the query was executed */,
  "query_string" TEXT /* Query string (e.g., SQL query) */,
  "query_duration" REAL /* Duration of the query execution */,
  "query_result_size" INTEGER /* Size of the query result in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who downloaded the data */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date and time the data was downloaded */,
  "download_data" TEXT /* Downloaded data (e.g., CSV file) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the downloaded file in bytes */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the downloaded file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "privileges" (
  "privilege_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each privilege entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user this privilege belongs to */,
  "privilege" TEXT /* Privilege granted to the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "privilege_type" TEXT /* Type of privilege (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "privilege_level" INTEGER /* Level of the privilege (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("privilege_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_privileges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
